sorry , i can't reach anyone today

--- Lesley Groff lesley@nysgllc.com wrote:

From: Pion, Paul [mailto:ppion@cantor.com]
Sent: Wednesday, January 25, 2006 2:18 PM
To: 'lesley@nysgllc.com'
Cc: Lutnick, Howard
Subject: reference

Jeffrey

Howard Lutnick has asked me to follow up with you
regarding a reference for
a driver position we are currently looking to fill.
I have recently met
with Arnold Garguilo who mentioned he had previously
drove for Mr. Wexner's
mother in-law. Howard thought you may have some
direct or indirect
knowledge about this driver candidate.

I would apreciate any information you could provide.
I can be reached on my
moilbe phone at (917) 596-9817.

Thanks very much.

Paul

Paul M. Pion
Senior Managing Director
Cantor Fitzgerald LP
